# OpenClaw Pipeline Output Example

This file documents the expected output file set from `scripts/run_evidence_pipeline.py`.

## Generated files

- `draft-summary.md`
- `draft-ledger.md`
- `draft-claim-map.md`
- `draft-gap-report.md`

## Intended use

Run the pipeline on a source list and claims file, then review the generated drafts before using them in any paper-writing workflow.
